enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about cheeseburgers, sharing his love for them despite rarely eating them, discussing the American origins of hamburgers, concerns about 'pink slime' in ground beef, and naming McDonald's Big Mac and fries as his favorites. He also touches on meat-eating culture in America versus Argentina and his preferred burger toppings.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: McDonald's Big Mac is his top pick
McDonald's fries are best due to crispiness and perfect salt distribution
not enough salt and not crispy enough
disgusted by it — calls it gross
puts everything on — cheese, lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard

claims.subject: cheese burgers
claims.claim: I love cheese burgers.

claims.subject: cheese burgers
claims.claim: I never eat cheese burgers but I want to.

claims.subject: cheese burgers
claims.claim: When I travel to other countries, I sometimes get a hamburger or a Big Mac.

claims.subject: cheese burgers
claims.claim: As a kid, I usually just got hamburgers to save money.

claims.subject: cheese burgers
claims.claim: I think it's good to get cheese burgers because the cheese is right there on the burger.

claims.subject: hamburgers
claims.claim: Hamburgers are basically an American food.

claims.subject: American food
claims.claim: American food includes hamburgers and chili.

claims.subject: American food
claims.claim: A lot of American food comes from Germany, like bacon.

claims.subject: bacon
claims.claim: Americans have thin crispy bacon, while the English have juicy bacon.

claims.subject: American agriculture
claims.claim: America has a lot of fields and grassland for cows.

claims.subject: American agriculture
claims.claim: Before cows, the land was occupied by buffalo.

claims.subject: buffalo
claims.claim: Americans used to eat buffalo, and sometimes still eat buffalo burgers.

claims.subject: meat consumption
claims.claim: Americans are big meat eaters, often preferring ground beef in hamburgers.

claims.subject: meat consumption
claims.claim: Argentinians are also big meat eaters, but they usually have it in steak form.

claims.subject: meat processing
claims.claim: Americans are now eating every part of the animal, like in India, but in a gross way.

claims.subject: meat processing
claims.claim: Some hamburgers contain 'pink slime,' which is melted bones and tendons with chemicals.

claims.subject: fast food
claims.claim: My favorite hamburger is from Burger King, though Burger King has slipped in quality.

claims.subject: fast food
claims.claim: I also like McDonald's Big Mac.

claims.subject: French fries
claims.claim: McDonald's has the best French fries because they're the crispiest.

claims.subject: French fries
claims.claim: McDonald's fries have the perfect amount of salt, evenly spread.

claims.subject: French fries
claims.claim: Burger King's fries are soggy, and Wendy's fries don't have enough salt and aren't crispy enough.

claims.subject: hamburger toppings
claims.claim: When I have a hamburger, I put everything on it: cheese, lettuce, tomato, ketchup, and mustard.
